chunks.text: ORDER SHEET IN THE HIGH COURT OF SINDH, CIRCUIT COURT, HYDERABAD C.P. No.D-656 of 2020 DATE ORDER WITH SIGNATURE OF JUDGE (S) 1. For orders on office objections. 2. For hearing of main case. 22.04.2021 Mr. Javed Ali Buriro, Advocate for the petitioner. Ch. Muhammad Ashraf Khan, Advocate for the respondent. == Counsel for the petitioner along-with respondent’s counsel state that the respondent has conceded to the grant of the alternative part prayer (a) reproduced as under: “To direct the respondent to call the petitioner in person for his personal hearing as the act of the respondent “not calling him to be heard” is against the law and it is crystal clear violation of the Article 10-A of the constitution.” Under the given circumstances, petitioner’s counsel is inclined not to press this petition on the instructions of his client. The petition is accordingly dismissed as not pressed; however, the opportunity afforded to the petitioner should be materialized in no more than thirty days. JUDGE JUDGE Muhammad Danish Steno*
